titlestmt.titleproper: Barack Obama presidential campaign and inauguration collection6828
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Julia Parker

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:36:48 UTC.

ead.archdesc:
======= RMM06828Barack Obama presidential campaign and inauguration collection6828Compiled by Julia ParkerDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
May 20092B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
socscThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:59:55 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Barack Obama presidential campaign and inauguration collection 6828
7.2 cubic feet. 7.2 cubic feet.
2008-2014. Memorabilia, newspapers, printed ephemera, publications Obama t-shirt and bumper sticker, and an extensive collection of newspapers and magazines about his Presidential campaign and inauguration. Collection material in English 6412199
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Julia Parker
Date completed:
May 15, 2009
EAD encoding:
Julia Parker, May 15, 2009
Date modified:
Ben Wrubel, October 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Obama t-shirt and bumper sticker, and an extensive collection of newspapers and magazines about his Presidential campaign and inauguration. Magazines include many photographs of Michelle Obama and the Obama family as well as images of President Obama.
Obama t-shirts, hat, signs, bumper stickers, and buttons, collected from the campaign in Richmond, Virginia.
Items from the Obama inauguration including posters, newspapers, magazines, flyers, pins, invitations, and other ephemera. Includes an Obama Christmas ornament, and a key ring with ribbons from Miller and Rhoades, a now-defunct Richmond, VA department store.
Also newspapers, clippings, and other memorabilia, largely from the Chicago Tribune, the New York Times, and other Chicago sources from the first year of Obama's presidency.
Campaign items from the 2012 election.
Obama t-shirts, hat, buttons, bumper stickers, iPhone case and "Victory Counsel Virginia Voter Advocate Training Manual," collected by Larry Palmer, 2012.
Three lawn signs (New Mexico for Obama, Native Americans for Obama, Hispanics for Obama) and a New Mexico Obama button.
Cornell Daily Sun, November 7, 2012 and Inauguration "invitation," 2012.
NOTES
Books by and about President Obama are cataloged separately.
Cite As:
Barack Obama presidential campaign and inauguration collection, #6828. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Buttons (information artifacts). T-shirts. Ephemera. Presidents -- United States -- Inauguration. Inauguration Day. Political campaigns -- United States. Elections -- United States. Campaign paraphernalia. Presidents -- United States -- Elections -- 2012. Presidents -- United States -- Elections -- 2008. Obama, Barack. Obama, Michelle, 1964- Obama family.
